__fixture__.name: onboarding_portability_manifest
__fixture__.scenario: Top-level onboarding_portability_manifest_record binding the three seeded state-item rows (tour_progress, recent_work_metadata, imported_profile_history) and the seven seeded entry-surface rows (first_run_no_account_open_folder, service_opt_in_telemetry_optional, managed_cloud_resume_reauth_required, privacy_reduced_open_and_clone_preserved, plus the three companion account_prompt_records). Declares all twelve const-true invariants required by §7.2. A manifest that declares any invariant asserted_true = false is a schema violation.

invariants.notes: first_run, reopen_with_pending_restore, offline_startup, and the privacy-reduced fixture each render at least one no_prompt primary action; primary_action.open_folder is the floor on every seeded non-takeover state.
first_run_no_account_open_folder row carries account_prompt_class = no_prompt; no seeded row on startup_state:first_run carries required_prompt.
privacy_reduced_open_and_clone_preserved fixture renders primary_action.open_folder under hide_all_except_open_and_clone with account_prompt_class = no_prompt.
Recent-work metadata clears via Clear recent work control; the Open folder row remains rendered with the same no_prompt posture.
first_run_no_account_open_folder and privacy_reduced_open_and_clone_preserved both carry equal_weight_with_account_rows = true; service_opt_in_telemetry_optional does not claim equal weight.

The closed decline_consequence_class vocabulary has no value that permits silent degradation; telemetry opt-in declines to stays_in_local_only_lane, managed-cloud resume declines to aborts_and_offers_local_alternative.
tour_progress, recent_work_metadata, and imported_profile_history each declare exactly one state_portability_class.

No account_scoped item in the corpus carries in_portable_profile_package or in_portable_profile_package_redacted. Account-scoped items (not in this fixture's state_items list but reserved by the canonical state-item table §6.3) sit in not_exported_machine_local.

first_run_no_account_open_folder and privacy_reduced_open_and_clone_preserved both declare boundary_crossing_class = no_boundary_crossed alongside account_prompt_class = no_prompt. service_opt_in_telemetry_optional declares emits_managed_telemetry alongside optional_prompt. managed_cloud_resume_reauth_required declares reaches_remote_resource alongside required_prompt. policy_forced_managed_fleet_sso and air_gapped_marketplace_unavailable prompts declare non-no_boundary_crossed classes alongside non-no_prompt classes.
Every state_item_id cited on any entry-surface row or account-prompt record in the corpus is declared in state_items.
policy_forced_managed_fleet_sso cites active_policy_bundle_ref = policy-fleet-sso-v7 and policy_forced_reason_code = managed_fleet_sso.
